SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2018 BY PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORT DISTRICT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DEIRDRE BOYE, CLAIMS ADJUSTER, THIRD PARTY REPRESENTATIVE FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT ALAMO RENTAL CAR SAN FRANCISCO AIRPORT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
